claim_boundary: This plan closes missing ordinary-test ownership from the coverage inventory and requires every skipped/scoped replay check to be attached to exact runtime or source evidence before it stops blocking the inventory.

repaired_exposed_issues.runner_unparsed_or_unavailable: flowpilot_process_liveness is now executed with its implementation-backed --json and --no-write-results arguments and is parseable in the refreshed sweep.
repaired_exposed_issues.meta_and_model_hierarchy_not_ok: Meta and model hierarchy now pass after parent evidence classification stopped treating live-run-only findings as release parent proof failures, and fresh layered full parent proofs were regenerated.

remaining_problem_boundary.runner_not_ok: The runner still reports a real model/runtime/code issue.
remaining_problem_boundary.live_runtime_or_state_findings: The model still reports live current-run or source-state findings; tests now keep them visible.
remaining_problem_boundary.missing_or_scoped_replay_adapter: Closed only when covered_skipped_checks names exact replay evidence for the skipped runner key.
remaining_problem_boundary.skipped_or_scoped_evidence: Closed only when covered_skipped_checks names exact runtime or source evidence for the skipped runner key.
remaining_problem_boundary.unclassified_model_tier: Closed by splitting unknown-tier from supporting-tier classification; future unknown runners remain blocking.
